docs.title: GeneratedSemanticKernelPluginScanner Class
docs.text:
Source-generation-friendly SemanticKernel plugin scanner that uses compile-time generated plugin type lists.

public sealed class GeneratedSemanticKernelPluginScanner : NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.ISemanticKernelPluginScanner

Inheritance System.Object 🡒 GeneratedSemanticKernelPluginScanner

Implements ISemanticKernelPluginScanner

docs.title: Remarks
docs.text:
When using source generation, the generator emits a NexusLabs.Needlr.Generated.SemanticKernelPlugins class containing: - StaticPluginTypes: Types with static [KernelFunction] methods - InstancePluginTypes: Types with instance [KernelFunction] methods - AllPluginTypes: Combined list of all plugin types

This scanner provides a reflection-free way to access these generated lists. For AOT/trimmed applications, use this scanner instead of NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.PluginScanners.AssemblySemanticKernelPluginScanner or NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.PluginScanners.ServiceProviderSemanticKernelPluginScanner which use reflection.

Usage:

// The generated types are available in NexusLabs.Needlr.Generated namespace
var pluginTypes = NexusLabs.Needlr.Generated.SemanticKernelPlugins.AllPluginTypes;

// Or use this scanner wrapper
var scanner = new GeneratedSemanticKernelPluginScanner();
var types = scanner.ScanForPluginTypes();

docs.title: SemanticKernelSyringe Class
docs.text:
Fluent builder for configuring Semantic Kernel with Needlr plugin discovery.

public sealed record SemanticKernelSyringe : System.IEquatable<NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.SemanticKernelSyringe>

Inheritance System.Object 🡒 SemanticKernelSyringe

Implements System.IEquatable<SemanticKernelSyringe>

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
// Obtained from SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel.UsingSemanticKernel()
SemanticKernelSyringe syringe = app.Services.UsingSemanticKernel();

// Register plugins and build the kernel factory
IKernelFactory kernelFactory = syringe
    .AddSemanticKernelPluginsFromGenerated(GeneratedSemanticKernelPlugins.AllPluginTypes)
    .BuildKernelFactory();

// Create a Kernel instance from the factory
Kernel kernel = kernelFactory.CreateKernel();

docs.title: Remarks
docs.text: This class uses reflection to discover methods with Microsoft.SemanticKernel.KernelFunctionAttribute. For AOT/trimmed applications, consider registering kernel functions explicitly.

docs.title: SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel Class
docs.text:
Extension methods for NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe that enable registering Semantic Kernel infrastructure (namely IKernelFactory) as part of the Needlr build pipeline.

public static class SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel

Inheritance System.Object 🡒 SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel

docs.title: Remarks
docs.text:
These helpers defer service registration using the Syringe post-plugin registration callback so that plugin discovery and registration are completed before the Semantic Kernel factory is added.

Note: Microsoft.SemanticKernel internally uses reflection to discover [KernelFunction] methods and create plugins. This integration therefore requires reflection and is not fully AOT-compatible. For AOT scenarios, consider registering kernel functions explicitly.

docs.title: SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel.UsingSemanticKernel(this ConfiguredSyringe) Method
docs.text:
Registers an IKernelFactory built via a SemanticKernelSyringe instance.

public static NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe UsingSemanticKernel(this NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe syringe);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text:
syringe NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe

The NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe to augment with the registration.

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe A new NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe instance containing the registration.

docs.title: Exceptions
docs.text: System.ArgumentNullException Thrown when syringe is null.

docs.title: Example
docs.text: var syringe = new Syringe().UsingReflection().UsingSemanticKernel();

docs.title: Remarks
docs.text: Use this overload when you do not need to configure Semantic Kernel.

docs.title: SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel.UsingSemanticKernel(this ConfiguredSyringe, Func<SemanticKernelSyringe,SemanticKernelSyringe>) Method
docs.text:
Registers an IKernelFactory built via a configurable SemanticKernelSyringe instance.

public static NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe UsingSemanticKernel(this NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe syringe, System.Func<NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.SemanticKernelSyringe,NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.SemanticKernelSyringe> configure);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text:
syringe NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe

The NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe to augment with the registration.

configure System.Func<SemanticKernelSyringe,SemanticKernelSyringe>

A delegate that receives a pre-initialized SemanticKernelSyringe (with its NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.SemanticKernelSyringe.ServiceProvider set) and returns the configured instance used to build the kernel factory.

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe A new NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe instance containing the registration.

docs.title: Exceptions
docs.text: System.ArgumentNullException Thrown when syringe or configure is null.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
var syringe = new Syringe()
    .UsingReflection()
    .UsingSemanticKernel(sk => sk with
    {
        // e.g., add plugins or configure options requiring the provider
        PluginTypes = new() { typeof(MyPlugin) },
    });

docs.title: Remarks
docs.text: Use this overload when your Semantic Kernel configuration needs access to services from the container during configuration.

docs.title: SyringeExtensionsForSemanticKernel.UsingSemanticKernel(this ConfiguredSyringe, Func<SemanticKernelSyringe>) Method
docs.text:
Registers an IKernelFactory built via a SemanticKernelSyringe created by the supplied delegate.

public static NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe UsingSemanticKernel(this NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe syringe, System.Func<NexusLabs.Foundry.Needlr.SemanticKernel.SemanticKernelSyringe> configure);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text:
syringe NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe

The NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe to augment with the registration.

configure System.Func<SemanticKernelSyringe>

A factory that creates a fully-configured SemanticKernelSyringe used to build the kernel factory. This is useful when configuration does not need the service provider.

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe A new NexusLabs.Needlr.Injection.ConfiguredSyringe instance containing the registration.

docs.title: Exceptions
docs.text: System.ArgumentNullException Thrown when syringe or configure is null.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
var syringe = new Syringe()
    .UsingReflection()
    .UsingSemanticKernel(() => new SemanticKernelSyringe
    {
        // Initialize without requiring the service provider
        PluginTypes = new() { typeof(MyPlugin) },
    });

Use these task-focused pages to move from the core runtime to a complete agent system:

  • Agent Framework integrations and workflows

  • GenAI token metrics

  • Langfuse integration
